summary: Azimuthal-symmetry attack imported into WIN-064 detail_evidence. The detail block now quotes the dome's verbatim 'Sub-Terrestrial Wall' mechanism and explains why a fixed geographic boundary cannot produce observer-centered rings at 104-140 deg around every epicenter worldwide. Cross-reference to Part 6 preserved. Apply the detail_evidence and tldr_evidence field patches in EXP-199.patches.
